note: HIGH-confidence auto-applied changes to lib/era-content/generation-content.ts. Research agent results fully merged.

applied_changes.rationale: stuttcars.com (Tier 1) explicitly states '2017–2019' for the 991.2 GTS. The GTS launched alongside the 991.2 facelift in MY2017, not MY2018. THREE Tier 1/2 sources (stuttcars, Wikipedia, supercars.net) all confirm 2017 launch.

992.1 Turbo S produces 650 PS / 478 kW / 641 hp SAE. The previous figure of 640 hp matches neither the PS (650) nor the SAE (641) figure. THREE sources confirm 641 hp: Wikipedia (650 PS / 478 kW / 641 hp), auto-data.net (650 PS / 478 kW / 641 hp), multiple search results. The error is one hp but on a paid analytics platform precision matters.
sources: Multiple automotive press sources confirming 641 hp SAE

applied_changes.rationale: Same correction as A02 — the engine description field also contained the incorrect 640 hp figure for Turbo S. Corrected to 641 hp for consistency and accuracy.
